title: Nursery Rhyme. DCXXXI. Relics.
content:
Little Tom Tucker
        Sings for his supper;
        What shall he eat?
        White bread and butter.
        How shall he cut it
        Without e'er a knife?
        How will he be married
        Without e'er a wife?
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DCXXXI. Relics." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
